title.en: What's more, this imprint is still evolving mor...

content.en:
As soon as the billionth change of the Dao of Space was realized, the Dao of Space immediately underwent a great change.

A billion changes continued to fuse together, and soon turned into a golden imprint that merged into Ye Tian's body.

This mark can easily burst out a billion changes in the Dao of Space, and it is blessed on the body, making Ye Tian's body gradually become stronger.

What's more, this imprint is still evolving more spatial path changes.

"This kind of mark is called the perfect mark, it's perfect!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

After having the space perfect seal, Ye Tian's strength has improved a lot again.

One can imagine how much his strength would increase if he mastered more perfect marks?

......

Ninetieth Boundary River.

On this day, a figure stepped in, and he was the Black Ancestor.

At this time, Heizu learned that there were some Eternal Masters in the Ninetieth Boundary River, and they were under the Infinite Masters, so he was ready to devour these Eternal Controllers, and attack the last bit of shackles of the changes of the Dao, and strive to condense the Dao into a billion changes.

As for whether he will offend Ye Tian, he won't care!

Soon.

He sensed the presence of a Six Realms-level master.

"A Six Realms-level controller, it's okay, let's swallow him first!"

Black Ancestor muttered.

Soon, he was going to use the dragon.

But at this moment, the surrounding time and space were distorted, and Ye Tian appeared.

"Black Ancestor, you dare to kill the Eternal Controller in my territory!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

"Infinite Master, what, you want to stop me, even your senior brother Black Decay Controller can't stop me!" Black Ancestor said arrogantly.

"If you leave now, and you will never be as good as the Ninety Boundary River, I will not kill you!" Ye Tian said.

"Kill me?"

Heizu said disdainfully.

"So, you're going to do it with me?"

Ye Tian said lightly.

"It's not that I'm going to do it with you, it's that you're going to die!"

In an instant, the two of them made a move.

As soon as possible, the Black Ancestor cast the Dark Great Nest, directly enveloping Ye Tian.

Hei Zu originally thought that Ye Tian's strength was not as good as that of the Black Decay Controller, after all, Ye Tian's reputation was not as good as that of the Black Decay Controller, and the time to become the Ten Realms level Controller was not very long.

Moreover, after Ye Tian became the Ten Realms-level controller, he almost never made a move, and he fought with the Black Decay Controller, but outsiders didn't know it!

Rumble!

Countless big black hands stretched out from the dark nest and grabbed Ye Tian.

I saw that Ye Tian urged the perfect body, holding the Will Blade and casting the Time and Space Cracking Blade.

In an instant, countless black big hands shattered, and the dark nest was also shattered by Ye Tian.

At this moment, Hei Zu's face changed greatly.

"Your strength ......"

Black Ancestor found that Ye Tian's aura was too terrifying, much stronger than the Black Decay Controller.

At this time, the Black Ancestor urged his will, and the black chain fused with the dark nest, and with a wave of his hand, the black chain seemed to turn into a black boundary river and smashed towards Ye Tian.

However.

Ye Tian still just slashed through it with a single sword, and he cut through this Black Realm River, knocking the Black Ancestor away, leaving a mark on his body.

"With this bit of strength, you dare to come to my Ninety Boundary River?"

Ye Tian sneered.

"I'm not your opponent, but you can't kill me either!" said Hei Zu unconvinced.

"Really?"

At this time, the perfect imprint of space on Ye Tian's body emerged.

This took Heizu by surprise.

"That's a billion spatial variations!"

It was the first time he had seen the Perfect Seal, but the changes in a billion spatial paths could be perceived.

Sure enough, his guess was correct, once a change in the Dao is mastered in a billion kinds, it will produce a change.

Obviously, this imprint is the result of change.

He hasn't done it yet, but Ye Tian has done it, how is this possible?

And not only that, Ye Tian also used his newly created perfect control technique-Ten Thousand Dao Blades!

"Slash!"

Ye Tian combined his perfect body with the perfect seal, coupled with the Will Blade Knife, and combined it to burst out with the perfect control technique of the Ten Thousand Dao Blade.

Not only that, Ye Tian also urged the Wanxianglin Dragon Statue and the Void Eyes move.

Rumble!!!!

Hei Zu was affected by the void eye, and the Ten Thousand Dao Blade directly bombarded his body.

Click!

Most of Hei Zu's body was shattered, and he was directly hit hard, and the origin was also injured.

"Impossible, I have a dark origin body, you can't kill me!!"

Black Ancestor roared.

"If it doesn't work once, then twice!"

Ye Tian shot again, beating Hei Zu to pieces again.

Bang bang bang!!

Ye Tian struck again and again, even if the body of the Black Ancestor could be reborn in the Dark Origin, but as the power of his Origin became less and less, his recovery speed became slower and slower, and in the end, he couldn't bear it.

"No, only great beings can kill me, how can you kill me?"

Heizu said in despair.

If he knew that Ye Tian was so demonic, he would not have been able to provoke Ye Tian!

He regretted it!

However, it was useless, and it was impossible for Ye Tian to let him go.

Under the attack again, the dark origin of the Black Ancestor was completely shattered, and he never recovered, and fell directly.

With the fall of the Black Ancestor, the inheritance of the Heaven Snatching Technique was shattered one by one, and many of the eternal masters who had learned the Heaven Snatching Technique were also horrified to find that they did not remember the content of the Heaven Snatching Technique.

The inheritance of the Heaven Snatching Technique had unexpectedly dissipated from the Origin Realm Sea.

This is what Black Ancestor did in the Heaven Snatching Technique, once he dies, this inheritance is completely gone.

......

White Styx Mountain.

The White Immortal Controller was also panicked at this moment, and the Black Ancestor had just passed on his new Heaven Snatching Technique, which could delay his death and make him very little affected by the Heaven Snatching Technique.

As a result, his Heaven-Snatching Technique was gone.

"How can this be, Heizu, Heizu......"

The White Immortal Ruler tried to contact the Black Ancestor, but was unable to do so.

The White Immortal controller guessed that something must have happened to the Black Ancestor.

"Black Ancestor won't be killed, right? Impossible, in the Origin Realm Sea, who has the strength to kill Black Ancestor? Even if all the Ten Realm-level controllers attack together, they can't do it, Black Ancestor can't beat it, and there is a way to escape!" Bai Ming thought to himself.

Then, a piece of news spread, and the Origin Realm Sea was boiling.

Ye Tian, the Endless Master, and Heizu fought in the Ninetieth Boundary River, and after this battle, Ye Tian won and Heizu was killed.

Those who heard the news were at first undare, but when they asked the other Eternal Masters, the news was the same.

At this time, they had to believe that it was the Black Ancestor who had really fallen!
